name: Microwave Apricot-Strawberry Compote
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh strawberries, hulled and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine wine, cranberry juice, lemon zest, and ginger in a small microwave-safe bowl. Cook uncovered on HIGH power for 2 minutes.
2. Add apricots; cook for an additional minute. Stir in vanilla. Allow mixture to cool to room temperature, then refrigerate until cold at least one hour.
3. Just before serving, remove lemon zest and stir in strawberries. Serve cold garnished with fresh lemon zest strips.
